headline: A Look At Air Products And Chemicals (APD) Valuation After Wells Fargo’s Overweight Upgrade And Hydrogen Contract Wins
summary: Wells Fargo’s recent upgrade of Air Products and Chemicals (APD) to Overweight, supported by strong quarterly earnings, a higher dividend, and new U.S. hydrogen contracts, has pushed the stock firmly back onto investor watchlists. See our latest analysis for Air Products and Chemicals. At a share price of US$287.98, Air Products and Chemicals has seen an 18.51% 90 day share price return and a 14.98% year to date share price return. Its 5 year total shareholder return of 18.37% suggests...

headline: How The Autodesk (ADSK) Investment Story Is Evolving As Growth Assumptions And Valuations Reset
summary: Autodesk’s latest analyst update trims its modeled fair value from US$343.46 to US$331.75, a reduction of about 3.4% that puts a finer point on where some see upside now. This shift lines up with research that still skews positive on the business, even as firms temper growth assumptions and adjust price targets both higher and lower. Read on to see what is driving these revisions and how you can keep track of the story as it develops. Analyst Price Targets don't always capture the full story...

headline: Wells Fargo Starts Coverage of Hasbro (HAS), Sees Balanced Risk and Reward
summary: Hasbro, Inc. (NASDAQ:HAS) is included among the 15 Best Dividend Leaders to Buy Right Now. On March 11, Wells Fargo initiated coverage of Hasbro, Inc. (NASDAQ:HAS) with an Equal Weight rating. The firm also set a $98 price target on the stock. The analyst said growth in the toy industry remains challenging and noted that […]
